home.title: Home
home.subtitle: Convert, enhance and download media with AI.
home.convertImages.desc: PNG, JPG, WEBP, GIF, ICO and PDF with batching and drag & drop.
home.convertVideos.desc: MKV, MP4, WEBM, AVI, GIF and audio extraction.
home.aiVideos.desc: Upscale videos to 1080p, 2K or 4K with AI and RIFE.
home.downloads.desc: Video and audio from YouTube, TikTok, Instagram and more.
home.settings.desc: Folders, GPU, concurrency, language and theme.
queue.title: Process queue
images.title: Convert images
images.subtitle: Convert between PNG, JPG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, ICO and PDF. Batch with metadata.
videos.title: Convert videos
videos.subtitle: Convert between containers or extract audio. FPS and resolution are preserved.
aiImages.title: AI · Upscale images
aiImages.subtitle: Real-ESRGAN super-resolution: sharper, less noise, no detail loss.
aiImages.dpiNote: Original DPI is preserved. GPU via Vulkan (NVIDIA/AMD/Intel) or CPU.
aiImages.textureHint: Blends a percentage of the original photo over the AI result to keep real skin grain and avoid the waxy look. 20-35% recommended for portraits; 0% for illustration.
aiImages.compareHint: The comparison slider will appear here after an upscale completes.
aiVideos.title: AI · Enhance videos
aiVideos.subtitle: Upscale to 1080p, 2K or 4K keeping FPS, audio and sync.
aiVideos.etaNote: Estimated time remaining is shown while processing.
downloads.title: Downloads
downloads.subtitle: Download video or audio from hundreds of sites with yt-dlp.
history.title: History
history.subtitle: Conversions, downloads and upscales saved automatically.
logs.title: Logs
logs.subtitle: Application events and error log.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Application preferences.
settings.outputDirSub: Where conversions and downloads are saved.
settings.concurrencySub: Maximum number of jobs running at once.
settings.gpuSub: Accelerates AI via Vulkan (NVIDIA CUDA, AMD, Intel). Disable to use CPU.
settings.qualitySub: Quality used for conversions when not specified.
settings.updatesSub: Automatically checks whether a new version exists.
settings.contextMenuSub: Adds “Convert with Escalador” to Explorer's right click.
settings.binariesSub: Real-ESRGAN, RIFE and yt-dlp are downloaded automatically on first use.
settings.updateStatus.notAvailable: You are on the latest version
